title: ehrendorferia ochroleuca
intro: Ehrendorferia ochroleuca, also known as the pale yellow gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ehrendorferia ochroleuca include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
